tasks.notes: Refactored OrbitClient to support query DSL traversals, Project anchoring, cheap health probe, and fake injection.
Rewrote agent.py to build code ImpactGraph, summarize blast radius, and execute bounds/missing-file checks.
Cleaned up exports, removed dead REST structures and ast parsing scan paths.
Implemented strict redaction safety for Orbit metadata, robust severity scaling, and load-bearing clamp at MEDIUM.
Implemented thorough unit/integration test suite covering transport queries, non-identity lines, out of bounds skips, fail-safes, determinism, and E2E review.

Addressed Round 3 refinements: self-sufficient calls coordinates join, query truncation limits warning, utf-8-sig BOM-tolerant response parsing, vulnerability severity cleanup, and non-overlapping coordinate regression tests.
